Virtual Vesak Lantern

A Digital Celebration of Light, Peace and Tradition

About

ΓÇ£Vesak celebrates the light of wisdom, compassion, and peace. This virtual lantern represents the beauty of Sri Lankan tradition through digital creativity, bringing the spirit of Vesak to life through colour, motion, and light.ΓÇ¥

Symbolism

Light

Represents wisdom and the dispelling of ignorance.

Colours

Represent unity and the Buddhist flag.

Rotation

Represents the spreading of Dhamma to all directions.

Lanterns

Represent compassion, peace, and offerings to the Buddha.
